mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANIMAL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE 1=1

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T.* FROM (
SELECT A.ANIMAL_ID, A.ANIMAL_NAME, A.ANIMAL_TYPE, A.BREED, A.GENDER, A.AGE, A.WEIGHT, A.ADOPTION_STATUS, A.PERSONALITY, A.VIEW_COUNT, A.CREATE_DATE, I.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS mainImage, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL F WHERE F.ANIMAL_ID = A.ANIMAL_ID AND F.MEMBER_ID = #{loginMemberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS isFavorite FROM ANIMAL A
LEFT OUTER JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY
A.VIEW_COUNT DESC A.CREATE_DATE DESC
) T ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAVORITE_ANIMAL (ANIMAL_ID, MEMBER_ID, CREATE_DATE) VALUES (#{animalId}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL WHERE ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT ANIMAL_ID as animalId, ANIMAL_NAME as animalName, ANIMAL_TYPE as animalType, BREED, GENDER, AGE, WEIGHT, ADOPTION_STATUS as adoptionStatus, PERSONALITY as personality, VIEW_COUNT as viewCount, CREATE_DATE as createDate FROM ANIMAL WHERE ANIMAL_ID =#{animalId}

SELECT IMAGE_ID as imageId, ANIMAL_ID as animalId, IS_MAIN as isMain, ORIGIN_FILE_NAME as originFileName, SAVE_FILE_NAME as saveFileName FROM ANIMAL_IMAGE WHERE ANIMAL_ID =#{animalId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN IS_MAIN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, IMAGE_ID
SELECT ANIMAL_ID as animalId, VACCINATION as vaccination, MICROCHIP as microchip, NEUTERED as neutered FROM ANIMAL_MEDICAL WHERE ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId}
SELECT ANIMAL_ID as animalId, RESCUE_DATE as rescueDate, STORY as story FROM ANIMAL_RESCUE WHERE ANIMAL_ID =#{animalId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FAVORITE_ANIMAL WHERE ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ANIMAL.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ANIMAL ( ANIMAL_ID, ANIMAL_NAME, ANIMAL_TYPE, BREED, GENDER, AGE, WEIGHT, ADOPTION_STATUS, PERSONALITY, VIEW_COUNT, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{animalId}, #{animalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{animalType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{breed, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{age, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{weight, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{adoptionStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personality, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO ANIMAL_MEDICAL ( ANIMAL_ID, VACCINATION, NEUTERED, MICROCHIP, SPECIAL_NOTE ) VALUES ( #{animalId}, #{vaccination}, #{neutered}, #{microchip}, #{specialNote} )
INSERT INTO ANIMAL_IMAGE ( IMAGE_ID, ANIMAL_ID, ORIGIN_FILE_NAME, SAVE_FILE_NAME, IS_MAIN ) VALUES ( SEQ_ANIMAL_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{animalId}, #{originFileName}, #{saveFileName}, #{isMain} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ANIMAL SET ANIMAL_NAME = #{animalName}, ANIMAL_TYPE = #{animalType}, BREED = #{breed}, GENDER = #{gender}, AGE = #{age}, WEIGHT = #{weight}, ADOPTION_STATUS = #{adoptionStatus}, PERSONALITY = #{personality} WHERE ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId}
mapper.select: SELECT SAVE_FILE_NAME FROM ( SELECT I.SAVE_FILE_NAME FROM ANIMAL A JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID WHERE A.ANIMAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND (I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' OR I.IS_MAIN IS NULL) ORDER BY A.CREATE_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANIMAL A WHERE 1=1
